name: Shadowcore Studyink
description: Detect PDFs & files on any website. Open them in a blazing-fast canvas-based viewer with virtual rendering — no Google Viewer, no lag. Generate AI handwritten notes. By yeh.naitik.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; style-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; object-src 'self'
